# Kiruvo

> Kiruvo is an AI-powered CRM and AI agent platform that automates lead management, follow-ups, bookings, and customer engagement for service businesses, studios, gyms, salons, and small B2B teams.

Kiruvo combines a full CRM (leads, contacts, customers, pipelines, kanban) with AI voice agents, AI chat agents, form auto-response, email campaigns, social media management, public booking pages, point-of-sale, group programs, and a customer self-service portal — all in one workspace.

## What Kiruvo does
- AI Voice Agents that call leads, qualify them, and book appointments
- AI Chat Agents trained on your business that handle inbound questions 24/7
- CRM with lead-to-customer conversion, deduplication, and bulk import
- Public booking pages with Stripe payments and staff assignment
- Email + SMS + social media campaigns from one inbox
- Group program enrollment, renewals, and roster management
- Customer portal for self-service scheduling and saved cards

## Pricing
- Starter — $60/mo: core CRM, forms, booking, email
- Pro — $140/mo: adds AI voice agents, SMS outreach, advanced automations
- Enterprise — $320/mo: white-glove setup, custom integrations, dedicated Twilio
- 20% discount on annual plans
- 14-day free trial, no card required

## Who it's for
Service businesses that book appointments and run programs: martial arts schools, dance studios, fitness gyms, yoga studios, salons, spas, tutoring centers, coaching practices, and small B2B agencies.
